steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The sentence specifies “a neighboring species with a negative effect value.” The table displays effect values for neighboring species—some positive, one negative.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
leafy spurge is the neighboring species with an effect value of -0.3238—the only negative value in the table. The other three either show neighboring species with positive effect values or aren't neighboring species at all.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
